_doc: 16-creative deployment: 10 statics + 6 videos across 4 vertical TVs. Each TV has a 4-slot loop (10s per slot = 40s total). V1+V3 carry 2 videos each (decision-zone TVs); V2+V4 carry 1 video each (reading-zone TVs). Every creative appears exactly once across all 16 slots — zero waste.
_inventory: 10 statics: 6 single-combo (C1-C6) + 4 multi-combo (VegPair C1-C2, ProteinPair C3-C4, BiryaniPair C5-C6, AllInOne C1-C4). 6 videos: V_C1 through V_C6.

_psychology.loop_duration: 40s — fast enough to keep attention, slow enough to read each frame
_psychology.slot_duration: 10s each — hard cut transitions every 10s synchronously across all 4 TVs
_psychology.motion_pattern: Slot 0: outer pair (V1+V3) pulses with hero videos. Slot 1: V2 (left) pulses. Slot 2: outer pair pulses again with second wave. Slot 3: V4 (counter) pulses. Customer's gaze is pulled outer→left→outer→counter→loop.
_psychology.v1_narrative: CENTER hero — Smart Pick video → Full menu → Premium video → Protein comparison. The decision pillar.
_psychology.v3_narrative: RIGHT premium — Mutton Biryani static → Chicken Biryani video → Biryani price ladder → Mutton Chatpata video. Premium upsell.
_psychology.v2_narrative: LEFT entry — C1 ₹149 anchor → C2 motion → Veg pair value comparison → C2 static close. Friendly affordable arc.
_psychology.v4_narrative: BAIN MARIE counter — C4 premium hero → C5 bestseller → Smart Pick at counter → Ghee Rice motion close. Decision-trigger arc.

name: psychology_v2_16creatives
description: 16-creative attention-rotation choreography. 4 TVs × 4 slots × 10s = 40s loop. 10 unique statics + 6 unique videos, each used exactly once.
